programmes.show_description: Discover the We R Makers Jewellery Press with its Metal Stamping Machine and Accessories Kit, designed for creating personalized jewellery.
Enter Sanntangle's creative world, where every project comes alive with new products and imaginative designs to inspire your next masterpiece.
Bring your creativity to life with Electric Ink Designs, featuring demonstrations, tips and ideas to help you create with confidence and style.
Bring your creations to life with Sizzix, exploring the latest products and imaginative projects designed to spark your creativity.

Vicki has some brand new gifting ideas if you or someone you know loves to make and bake.
Sandi Millichip-Massocchi will be bringing us the brand new Honey Pot Tote Bag, with a beautiful Honeycomb design.
Barbara Donovan brings us an hour and a half of Joseph Bear kits!
...Cushions: Sandi Millichip-Massocchi will be demonstrating the brand new Bobbin Lane Cushion from Helen Newton, and the popular Potting Shed.
Don't miss your opportunity to pick up beautiful quilt kits at great prices before they're gone.

William Morris Homewares bring timeless design into everyday living, with beautifully crafted pieces inspired by iconic heritage patterns.
Alistair MacDonald will be bringing us brand new Velvets & Lining Fabrics. With New Bias Bindings in the hour as well.
Join us and Rebecca Alexander-Frost for her brand new bag designs, Smithfield Bag and Balfour Wash bag.
